notes: Candidate dry-run liquid-handling world grounded in PyLabRobot Chatterbox, Visualizer, OT-2 simulator, and tracker semantics.
A runtime world would need selected state schema for deck resources, tip inventory, channel-mounted tips, well volumes, tip volumes, and verifier invariants.

This source pack is stronger than documentation-index-only lab packs for dry-run action semantics because official docs provide concrete Chatterbox and simulator output plus tracker failure modes. It still authorizes no live hardware execution.
